testcase.name: tenantList_supportsPaginationQuery
testcase.system-out: 2026-04-02T09:30:47.303-03:00 DEBUG 1313692 --- [all-citizens] [o-auto-1-exec-7] org.hibernate.SQL : select tje1_0.id from tenant tje1_0 where tje1_0.code=? fetch first ? rows only 2026-04-02T09:30:47.306-03:00 DEBUG 1313692 --- [all-citizens] [o-auto-1-exec-7] org.hibernate.SQL : select tje1_0.id, tje1_0.active, tje1_0.code, tje1_0.config, tje1_0.created_at, tje1_0.name, tje1_0.updated_at from tenant tje1_0 where tje1_0.id=? 2026-04-02T09:30:47.308-03:00 DEBUG 1313692 --- [all-citizens] [o-auto-1-exec-7] org.hibernate.SQL : insert into tenant (active, code, config, created_at, name, updated_at, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) 2026-04-02T09:30:47.314-03:00 DEBUG 1313692 --- [all-citizens] [o-auto-1-exec-7] org.hibernate.SQL : select alje1_0.id, alje1_0.actor_roles, alje1_0.actor_subject, alje1_0.actor_username, alje1_0.client_ip, alje1_0.correlation_id, alje1_0.http_method, alje1_0.occurred_at, alje1_0.request_path, alje1_0.response_status from audit_log alje1_0 where alje1_0.id=? 2026-04-02T09:30:47.317-03:00 DEBUG 1313692 --- [all-citizens] [o-auto-1-exec-7] org.hibernate.SQL : insert into audit_log (actor_roles, actor_subject, actor_username, client_ip, correlation_id, http_method, occurred_at, request_path, response_status, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) 2026-04-02T09:30:47.388-03:00 DEBUG 1313692 --- [all-citizens] [o-auto-1-exec-8] org.hibernate.SQL : select tje1_0.id, tje1_0.active, tje1_0.code, tje1_0.config, tje1_0.created_at, tje1_0.name, tje1_0.updated_at from tenant tje1_0 where lower(tje1_0.name) like lower(('%'||?||'%')) escape '' or lower(tje1_0.code) like lower(('%'||?||'%')) escape '' fetch first ? rows only
